articles.title: Efekta adds global AI and policy leaders to guide education strategy | ETIH EdTech News
articles.summary: The company adds former heads of government and AI executives to guide how its platform scales across education systems and policy environments.

articles.title: TED, Khan Academy, ETS launch AI-focused higher education institute | ETIH EdTech News
articles.summary: The institute is being developed with input from corporate partners including Google, Microsoft, Accenture, Bain & Company, McKinsey & Company, and ...

articles.title: AI learning app Gizmo levels up with 13M users and a $22M investment
articles.summary: Gizmo, an AI-powered learning platform, has attracted more than 13 million users and just secured $22 million in Series A funding.

articles.title: Unacademy to be acquired by upGrad in share-swap deal as India’s edtech sector consolidates
articles.summary: The deal comes after Unacademy’s valuation plunged from $3.5B to under $500M, as India’s once-booming edtech sector struggles.

articles.title: India’s Emversity doubles valuation as it scales workers AI can’t replace
articles.summary: Emversity has raised $30 million in a new round as it scales job-ready training in India.

articles.title: Coursera and Udemy enter a merger agreement valued at around $2.5B
articles.summary: Coursera and Udemy, two of the biggest names in online learning, are combining platforms next year.

articles.title: Unacademy’s founder says startup is now worth less than $500M, confirms M&A talks
articles.summary: Unacademy's valuation has dropped by over 85% from its pandemic-era peak price tag of $3.5 billion, its founder said.

articles.title: Find Your Grind raises $5M to grow platform empowering students to explore unique career paths
articles.summary: Nick Gross says that Find Your Grind gives students the tools to explore what careers are out there and what paths suit their strengths, interests, and visions for what they want their futures to look like.

articles.title: Physics Wallah enjoys a rosy IPO day, bucking the broader slowdown in Indian edtech
articles.summary: The Indian edtech startup ended its first day as a public company on a high, with its shares closing 44% higher than they were listed for, indicating that the country's edtech sector may still recover after years of...

articles.title: After selling to Spotify, Anchor’s co-founders are back with Oboe, an AI-powered app for learning
articles.summary: Oboe is a new AI-powered learning platform that lets you create personalized courses on any topic with a prompt.
